metadata.method_name: Phase 1: Monte Carlo Estimator Validation & Geometric Confound Analysis
metadata.description: Task A: MC simulation of AR(1) sequences comparing 3 autocorrelation estimators across 102 parameter cells. Task B: Three-pronged geometric confound analysis on synthetic and real dependency trees.

estimator_recommendation.rationale: Bias cancels in excess measure (real minus RPL); r1_standard preferred for lowest variance.
